title: senecio kuntzeanus
intro: Senecio kuntzeanus, also known as Kuntze's ragwort, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family Asteraceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Senecio kuntzeanus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and serve as an antihelmintic, helping to eliminate parasitic worms. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally to harness its medicinal properties.
